'''kajobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zed|zed]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zed|zed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kajobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæjebeth|kæjebeth]] || [[word:kæjebej|kæjebej]] || [[word:kæjebesh|kæjebesh]] || [[word:kæjebe|kæjebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kajojoboth|kajojoboth]] || [[word:kajojoboj|kajojoboj]] || [[word:kajojobosh|kajojobosh]] || [[word:kajojobo|kajojobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kajoboth|kajoboth]] || [[word:kajoboj|kajoboj]] || [[word:kajobosh|kajobosh]] || [[word:kajobo|kajobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kajofboth|kajofboth]] || [[word:kajofboj|kajofboj]] || [[word:kajofbosh|kajofbosh]] || [[word:kajofbof|kajofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kajobotho|kajobotho]] || [[word:kajobojo|kajobojo]] || [[word:kajobosho|kajobosho]] || [[word:kajoboko|kajoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kajoboth|kajoboth]] || [[word:kajoboj|kajoboj]] || [[word:kajobosh|kajobosh]] || [[word:kajobo|kajobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kajobothol|kajobothol]] || [[word:kajobojol|kajobojol]] || [[word:kajoboshol|kajoboshol]] || [[word:kajobokol|kajobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kajobothotho|kajobothotho]] || [[word:kajobojojo|kajobojojo]] || [[word:kajoboshosho|kajoboshosho]] || [[word:kajoboko|kajoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kajobothon|kajobothon]] || [[word:kajobojon|kajobojon]] || [[word:kajoboshon|kajoboshon]] || [[word:kajobokon|kajobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kajobothoro|kajobothoro]] || [[word:kajobojoro|kajobojoro]] || [[word:kajoboshoro|kajoboshoro]] || [[word:kajobokoro|kajobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
